title: gh_capture_preview
description: Capture a Rhino viewport screenshot framed to live Grasshopper preview bounds without baking preview geometry. Bounds are computed from visible IGH_PreviewObject.ClippingBox values, optionally filtered by graph_id or target aliases/GUIDs/nicknames.

viewport.description: Target Rhino viewport: active, perspective, top, front, right, back, left, bottom, or a custom viewport name.

graph_id.description: Optional graph ownership tag. When provided and targets is omitted, only objects with this graph_id are considered.

targets.description: Optional aliases, GUIDs, or nicknames to frame. Takes precedence over graph_id.

include_hidden.description: Whether preview-hidden Grasshopper objects can contribute bounds.

recompute.description: Run a Grasshopper solution before computing preview bounds.

open_canvas.description: Open Grasshopper and make the working document active before capture.

padding_factor.description: Multiplier used to add breathing room around the preview bounds.
